channel.title: Kernel on Greg Herlein
channel.description: Recent content in Kernel on Greg Herlein

item.title: How the AMD ISP4 Camera Stack Broke My ZBook Trackpad (and How Claude Helped Me Find It)
item.description: One morning I opened my HP ZBook Ultra G1a and the trackpad was dead. Keyboard fine. Touchscreen fine. External mouse fine. Trackpad: nothing. Twelve hours earlier it had worked. I hadn’t changed anything. Welcome to bleeding-edge silicon on Linux.

item.title: Blast from the past - Linux Telephony API
item.description: A trip down memory lane: the first linux telephony drivers
